ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the country in billion USD */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "origins" (
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each origin */,
  "origin_name" TEXT /* Name of the origin */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the origin belongs to */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the origin */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the origin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("origin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_origins_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "destinations" (
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each destination */,
  "destination_name" TEXT /* Name of the destination */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the destination belongs to */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the destination */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the destination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("destination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_destinations_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "migration_types" (
  "migration_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each migration type */,
  "migration_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the migration type (e.g., permanent, temporary, refugee) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the migration type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("migration_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "migration_data" (
  "migration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each migration data point */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the migration data belongs to */,
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the origin */,
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination */,
  "migration_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the migration type */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  "num_migrants" INTEGER /* Number of migrants */,
  "migrant_population" REAL /* Population of migrants in the destination country */,
  "migration_rate" REAL /* Migration rate as a percentage of the total population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("migration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migration_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migration_data_destination_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_id") REFERENCES destinations ("destination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migration_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migration_data_origin_id FOREIGN KEY ("origin_id") REFERENCES origins ("origin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migration_data_migration_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("migration_type_id") REFERENCES migration_types ("migration_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "migration_data_origins" (
  "migration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the migration data */,
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the origin */,
  "num_migrants_from_origin" INTEGER /* Number of migrants from the origin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("migration_id", "origin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "migration_data_destinations" (
  "migration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the migration data */,
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination */,
  "num_migrants_to_destination" INTEGER /* Number of migrants to the destination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("migration_id", "destination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "migration_data_types" (
  "migration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the migration data */,
  "migration_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the migration type */,
  "num_migrants_by_type" INTEGER /* Number of migrants by migration type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("migration_id", "migration_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "migration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the migration data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the migration data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the migration data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_migration_id FOREIGN KEY ("migration_id") REFERENCES migration_data ("migration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "migration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the migration data the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file (e.g., CSV, Excel, PDF) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_migration_id FOREIGN KEY ("migration_id") REFERENCES migration_data ("migration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data file */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the data version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the data version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES data_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the research project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the research project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_project_users" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the research project (e.g., lead, contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "user_id")
)
